name: Jiffy Tomato Sauce M/w I.e.s.jjgf65a
recipeInstructions:
1. Uncovered, microwave safe 2 quart casserole on high for 2 minutes until golden.
2. Add tomato puree, hot water, salt, sugar, basil, oregano and red pepper flakes.
3. Cover with wax paper and microwave on high for seven to eight minutes, stirring at half time, until bubbly.
4. Stir again. Re cover and microwave on medium for nine to ten minutes, stirring at half time, until flavors mellow.
5. Adjust salt as needed and serve, makes about one quart.
